channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Artemis II Crew Successfully Returns to Earth After Space Mission
item.description: The Artemis II crew has successfully returned to Earth after completing their historic mission, marking a significant achievement in space exploration. Following their splashdown, the astronauts emerg...

item.title: Sylfirm X introduces new non-invasive skin care options in Manila
item.description: Sylfirm X, a revolutionary non-invasive skin care treatment, has made its debut in Manila, bringing a fresh approach to beauty clinics. Known for its ability to address skin concerns like aging and ac...

item.title: Scottish court holds man responsible for wife’s death after prolonged abuse
item.description: A Scottish man, Lee Milne, 39, has been sentenced to eight years in prison after being found guilty of culpable homicide for the death of his wife, Kimberly Milne, 28, who took her own life in July 20...

item.title: Anthropic withholds powerful Claude Mythos AI model from public release due to cybersecurity risks
item.description: Anthropic has announced Claude Mythos Preview, its most capable AI model to date, which demonstrates exceptional abilities in identifying and exploiting software vulnerabilities across major browsers,...

item.title: Investigation Underway into Alleged R2.9bn Irregular Security Tenders at Tshwane Metro Police
item.description: The Tshwane Metropolitan Police Department is under scrutiny following allegations of irregularities in tenders worth R2.9-billion. Suspended director Tshukudu Malatji appeared before the Madlanga Com...

item.title: Philippines revisits potential oil cooperation with China amid fuel price surge, with caution over sovereignty
item.description: As fuel prices continue to rise sharply in the Philippines, government proposals to explore joint oil and gas development with China have resurfaced. Lawmakers, experts, and fisherfolk groups have voi...

item.title: How to watch NASA’s Artemis II splashdown after historic moon mission
item.description: NASA's Artemis II mission, the first crewed lunar mission in over 50 years, is about to end with a dramatic splashdown back on Earth. The four astronauts aboard the Orion spacecraft — Reid Wiseman, Vi...

item.title: Hazari̇bagh Man Dies in Lake Fishing Accident
item.description: A tragic incident occurred in Hazari̇bagh, Jharkhand, where a man lost his life while fishing in a local lake. Details surrounding the exact circumstances of the drowning are still emerging, but autho...

item.title: High solar demand strains Philippine supply and workforce
item.description: The article explains how a sudden surge in demand for rooftop solar in the Philippines is overwhelming local installers and supply chains as households rush to protect themselves from rising fuel and ...

item.title: Pakistan Government Announces Significant Reduction in Petrol and Diesel Prices
item.description: On Friday, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif announced a major reduction in fuel prices during a televised address. Petrol price has been cut by Rs12 per litre to Rs366, while high-speed diesel (HSD) has ...

item.title: Pillar of Hope unveiled for Highway of Tears victims in Prince George
item.description: Family members of Indigenous women and girls who have gone missing or been murdered along the Highway of Tears gathered in Prince George, B.C., for the unveiling of the Pillar of Hope. This monument, ...

item.title: Fairness must guide athlete selection in Kenya
item.description: The editorial from Nation Africa argues that Kenya must embrace fairness, transparency, and merit when selecting athletes for international competitions. It highlights that sports, especially athletic...

item.title: Volkswagen unveils limited Polo GTI Edition 20 to mark 20 years in South Africa
item.description: Volkswagen has introduced the Polo GTI Edition 20 in South Africa, a limited series of 400 vehicles celebrating two decades since the Polo GTI first hit local roads in 2006. The launch also coincides ...

item.title: Australian War Memorial updates Ben Roberts-Smith display following war crime charges
item.description: Ben Roberts-Smith, Australia's most decorated living Afghanistan veteran, has been arrested over allegations of war crimes committed in Afghanistan between 2009 and 2012. The charges include five coun...

item.title: ANC faces internal strain as SACP opts to contest local elections independently
item.description: ANC secretary-general Fikile Mbalula admitted that the African National Congress has failed to dissuade the South African Communist Party (SACP) from contesting the upcoming local government elections...

item.title: Assemblymember Zohran Mamdani Marks His 100th Day in Albany With Policy Push and Progressive Goals
item.description: The Politico New York Playbook PM piece titled “Mamdani’s 100th Day” reflects on Assemblymember Zohran Mamdani’s first 100 days in office after beginning his current legislative session in Albany. The...

item.title: U.S. Embassy Abuja Suspends Visa Services Over Security Concerns, Nigerians React with Fear and Suspicion
item.description: Plenty Nigerians don begin panic and dey suspect something wey no too clear after di U.S. Embassy for Abuja announce say dem go suspend visa appointments. Di embassy talk for one short message wey dem...

item.title: Artemis II Mission Concludes with Safe Return to Earth
item.description: NASA's Artemis II mission has successfully concluded with the safe return of its four astronauts to Earth. The crew – Christina Koch, Victor Glover, Reid Wiseman, and Jeremy Hansen of the Canadian Spa...

item.title: Tension arises as Kinangop MP interrupts Senator Methu during public function
item.description: There was a brief moment of drama in Kinangop, Nyandarua County, when Member of Parliament Kwenya Thuku interrupted Senator John Methu as he was addressing a gathering. According to witnesses, the exc...

item.title: Filipino Groups BINI and KATSEYE’s Sophia to Perform at Coachella 2026
item.description: Kapuso and Kapamilya fans, get ready to celebrate! Filipino girl groups BINI and KATSEYE, featuring artist Sophia, are set to represent the Philippines at the prestigious Coachella music festival in 2...
